title: Intelligent solutions through digital transformation drive results from every aspect of the responsible value chain. Whi…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Intelligent solutions through digital transformation drive results from every aspect of the responsible value chain. Which of the following is an example of how intelligent solutions drive impact at the design stage?


Leveraging the digital twin technology to help clients optimize design to build products with low carbon footprint

Introducing product platform engineering and modernization

Digitizing the research and development processes

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Leveraging the digital twin technology to help clients optimize design to build products with low carbon footprint.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Which of the following are the three most important areas that comprise a responsible value chain?


Trust, Use Extension, Sustainable

Trust, Net Zero, Circular

Trust, Net Zero, Leadership

Net Zero, Circular, Use Extension

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
ccenture has set ambitious sustainability goals such as recycling 100% of its waste and significantly reducing water usage. The company plans to achieve net zero by _______.


2040

2050

2030

2025

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
What is the aim of the European Union’s Sustainable Financial Disclosure Regulation?


It is aimed at ensuring that a company has a strong environmental agenda and becomes an environmentally responsible organization.

It is aimed at ensuring transparency in the sourcing of raw materials and managing relationships in the value chain.

It is aimed at obtaining transparent, traceable, and quality environmental, social, and governance (ESG) data from companies across their value chains.

It is aimed at ensuring asset managers, financial advisors, and other financial market participants consider sustainability and environmental, social, and governance (ESG) factors in their decision-making around investments.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: It is aimed at obtaining transparent, traceable, and quality environmental, social, and governance (ESG) data from companies across their value chains.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Identify the key drivers that enable businesses to win stakeholder trust in a responsible value chain.


Supply chain traceability, supplier ethics and transparency, working conditions including fair wages and health and safety, and zero corruption

Ethical sourcing of raw materials and supply chain traceability

Responsible treatment of hazardous substances and supply chain traceability

Fair wages and health and safety for all workers

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Supply chain traceability, supplier ethics and transparency, working conditions including fair wages and health and safety, and zero corruption are key drivers that enable businesses to win stakeholder trust in a responsible value chain.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
How can a multinational retail chain embed a responsibility mindset across its product and operations value chain through its vision and strategy?


By designing responsible and intelligent products and platforms

By fleet electrification or route optimization in its logistics functions

By working closely with the supplier ecosystem in its value chain to set goals for greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and provide incentives and credits for sustainable initiatives

By following resource-optimized sourcing or a renewable energy sourcing strategy

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: By working closely with the supplier ecosystem in its value chain to set goals for greenhouse gas (GHG) emissions and provide incentives and credits for sustainable initiatives.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Identify the five important elements that businesses need to examine in any ambition-setting exercise.


Capabilities; governance; technology, tools, and insights; roles and responsibilities; key performance indicators (KPIs) and incentives

Capabilities; governance; operating models; systems; key performance indicators (KPIs) and incentives

Capabilities; governance; technology, tools, and insights; operating models; key performance indicators (KPIs) and incentives

Capabilities; processes; technology, tools, and insights; roles and responsibilities; key performance indicators (KPIs) and incentives

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Capabilities; governance; technology, tools, and insights; operating models; key performance indicators (KPIs) and incentives.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
A leading consumer goods firm has adopted Accenture’s 360° Value framework. A responsible value chain is a significant component of this framework. How can this contribute to the consumer experience and growth of their brand?


A responsible value chain will help the company to establish responsible production and consumption practices throughout its manufacturing processes.

A responsible value chain will help the company to provide complete transparency to their consumers on the ecological and ethical footprint of the company’s products and services.

A responsible value chain will enable the company to reduce its carbon footprint and improve its social responsibility measures.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: All of the above. A responsible value chain will help the company to establish responsible production and consumption practices throughout its manufacturing processes, provide complete transparency to their consumers on the ecological and ethical footprint of the company’s products and services, and reduce its carbon footprint and improve its social responsibility measures. This, in turn, can contribute to the consumer experience and growth of their brand.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text:
Aercrux Corporation Pvt. Ltd. has decided to embrace the opportunities of a responsible value chain along the three pillars of Trust, Net Zero, and Circular. Which of the following actions can the company take toward achieving Net Zero?


Provide a living wage or income to everyone who directly provides goods and services to the company.

Transition to 100% renewable electricity in production and become carbon negative for all their direct and indirect emissions.

Make their materials packaging returnable or recyclable.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: Transition to 100% renewable electricity in production and become carbon negative for all their direct and indirect emissions.
